overview: CareBridge is a community health monitoring platform with distinct role-based panels for doctors, patients, admins, and visitors. Each user type gets a tailored experience — doctors see their review workflow, patients see their own records, admins manage users and stats, and visitors get a public landing page.
features: Doctor panel with clinical review workflow
Admin panel with user management and system stats
Patient panel showing personal health records only
Visitor public landing page (no login required)
Role-based routing — each role lands on their own panel
Visitor role added to user type system
